news.title: Building a trading analytics tool and looking for honest feedback
news.summary:
Hey everyone, I’m working on a tool for active traders and wanted some honest feedback before I go further.

The idea is simple: you upload your trade history, or eventually connect your brokerage account, and it analyzes your past trades to show what is actually helping or hurting your returns.

The part I’m most interested in is the behavior side of trading. For example, it could show whether you tend to hold losers too long, cut winners too early,

news.title: 恐惧贪婪指数: 17 (Extreme Fear)
news.summary: 当前加密市场恐惧贪婪指数为 17，分类为「Extreme Fear」。 市场处于极度恐惧状态，历史上往往是抄底机会。
